title: Well Animal Checkups * Homelessness Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Well Animal Checkups * Homelessness Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Homelessness Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF PRO-BONE-O VETERINARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Volunteer-run clinics provide medical exams, vaccinations, flea treatments, and vouchers for spay/neuter services. Services are provided on a first-come, first-serve basis, and individuals are limited to two pets per person. Assistance is dependent upon available abilities and not guaranteed. 1509 W 1st Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Individuals who are homeless Hours: 2nd and 4th Sundays of the month, 9am-1pm. Gates open at 8:45am and the last patients will be admitted at noon. Email (541) 799-0441 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PRO-BONE-O VETERINARY CARE
